name: Osmozis SA
summary: Osmozis SA invents, develops, manufactures, tests, installs, and operates wireless Wi-Fi networks and various related connected device solutions in Europe. The company offers OsmoKey, a solution of connected locks without cable, which allows to replace the traditional keys by RFID bracelets; OsmoCam, a wireless CCTV solution; OsmoAlert, a wireless sound alarm device; and OsmoCheck, a software solution for managing various one-off or regular technical work. It also provides Canal Info, a virtual caretaker service that allows holidaymakers to find out about events and book activities; Totem Info, an interactive touch screen; OsmoConnect, a certification service for third-party solutions; and flexible Wi-Fi solutions. The company serves holidaymakers, holiday site managers, and tourism agents. Osmozis SA was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Clapiers, France.
